items.title: Journal page header and tab bar
items.scope: frontend — migrate journal-main content chrome inside SHELL-07 slot: page title/subtitle (ai_RNbBHXif), journal vs milestones tab buttons (ai_RNbBHXij), and tab-panel visibility toggling; exclude header/sidebar CustomElements owned by SHELL
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Journal content slot renders ai_RNbBHXie journal-content-area with data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHXif header and ai_RNbBHXij tab bar preserving IR group hierarchy
AC-2: journal-tab-btn and milestones-tab-btn toggle visibility between ai_RNbBHXim journal-tab-content and ai_RNbBHXjO milestones-tab-content matching Bubble tab behavior
AC-3: Header and tab typography/style_ref tokens resolve through ir/slices/styles.json without redesigning layout
items.layout_notes: Mount inside SHELL-07 content boundary at ai_RNbBHXid; do not re-implement ai_RNbBKLUl sidebar or ai_RNbBKLUm header (~9 journal-main-root entities plus tab chrome).

items.title: Journal entries list and cards
items.scope: frontend — migrate journal tab actions row, journal-entries-grid RepeatingGroup, entry card cell template, and read-only list fetch for JournalEntry rows; mood_tag_text badges on cards
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ai_RNbBHXim journal-tab-content renders ai_RNbBHXin actions row and ai_RNbBHXiu journal-entries-grid with data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHXiv journal-entry-card-template
AC-2: Grid lists current user's journal entries from uds_journalentry (title_text, mood_tag_text, content preview) via Supabase client — no project/ schema edits
AC-3: new-entry-btn (ai_RNbBHXir) and journal-view-entry-btn (ai_RNbBHXjN) emit open-popup events wired in later items; entry count label reflects list length
items.layout_notes: RepeatingGroup card preserves nested badge row (ai_RNbBHXix) and reflection indicator group; fit_width fluid layout per ui-fidelity rubric.

items.title: New journal entry popup and create flow
items.scope: frontend — migrate new-entry-popup (ai_RNbBHXkK) form fields (title, mood tag, content) and Bubble create-JournalEntry workflows triggered by new-entry-save-btn
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Popup ai_RNbBHXkK renders header ai_RNbBHXkM and form ai_RNbBHXkS with data-bubble-id on inputs ai_RNbBHXkV, ai_RNbBHXkY, ai_RNbBHXkb preserving IR hierarchy
AC-2: new-entry-save-btn inserts uds_journalentry row (title_text, mood_tag_text, content_text, user_user) then closes popup and refreshes JOURNAL-02 grid
AC-3: new-entry-cancel-btn and new-entry-close-btn dismiss without persisting; static labels match IR text expressions
items.layout_notes: Page-level Popup mounted from JournalPage; z-index above journal-main; ~19 popup entities plus create workflows bTIYE/bTIYG cluster.

items.title: Entry detail popup with edit, delete, and AI reflection
items.scope: frontend — migrate entry-detail-popup (ai_RNbBHXkh): editable fields, delete confirmation section, ai-reflection-section with generate-reflection-btn, and update/delete JournalEntry workflows
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Popup ai_RNbBHXkh opens bound to selected JournalEntry with data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHXkt form, ai_RNbBHXlD ai-reflection-section, and ai_RNbBHXla delete-confirm-section
AC-2: entry-save-changes-btn updates uds_journalentry fields; entry-delete-confirm-btn removes row; entry-detail-close-btn cancels edits
AC-3: generate-reflection-btn calls existing Supabase edge/RPC surface for ai_reflection_text (read project/ for contract only) and renders ai_RNbBHXlP ai-reflection-text
items.layout_notes: Largest popup subtree (~55 entities); preserve badge group ai_RNbBHXkl and stacked form/reflection/actions vertical groups.

items.title: Milestones tab list and relapse events section
items.scope: frontend — migrate milestones-tab-content: milestones-actions-row, milestones-grid RepeatingGroup with milestone-card-template, relapse-events-section header, and relapse-events-grid listing
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: ai_RNbBHXjO milestones-tab-content renders ai_RNbBHXja milestones-grid and ai_RNbBHXjp relapse-events-section with data-bubble-id on card templates ai_RNbBHXjb and ai_RNbBHXjz
AC-2: Grids load uds_milestone and uds_relapseevent for current user via Supabase client; milestone-card-title/date and relapse-event-date fields bind to row data
AC-3: add-milestone-btn, log-relapse-btn, milestone-card and relapse-card action buttons emit open-popup events for JOURNAL-06/07 items
items.layout_notes: Milestones tab (~38 entities) includes private relapse subsection below divider ai_RNbBHXjr; preserve milestones-count-label and relapse-private-badge copy.

items.title: Add and edit milestone popups
items.scope: frontend — migrate add-milestone-popup (ai_RNbBHXlf) and edit-milestone-popup (ai_RNbBHXmC) forms with create/update/delete Milestone workflows
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Popups ai_RNbBHXlf and ai_RNbBHXmC render title/description/date fields with data-bubble-id on DateInput ai_RNbBHXlw and ai_RNbBHXmS preserving form group hierarchy
AC-2: add-milestone-save-btn creates uds_milestone row; edit-milestone-save-btn updates; edit-milestone-delete-btn removes row and refreshes JOURNAL-05 grid
AC-3: Cancel/close buttons on both popups dismiss without mutation; achieved_at_date maps to achieved_at_date column
items.layout_notes: Two page-level popups (~38 entities combined); edit popup includes delete-left / save-right action row ai_RNbBHXmT.

items.title: Log and edit relapse event popups
items.scope: frontend — migrate log-relapse-popup (ai_RNbBHXma) and edit-relapse-popup (ai_RNbBHXnA) forms with create/update/delete RelapseEvent workflows and disclaimer copy
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Popups ai_RNbBHXma and ai_RNbBHXnA render date and notes fields with data-bubble-id on DateInput ai_RNbBHXml/ai_RNbBHXnL and MultiLineInput ai_RNbBHXmp/ai_RNbBHXnO
AC-2: log-relapse-save-btn creates uds_relapseevent row; edit-relapse-save-btn updates; edit-relapse-delete-btn removes row and refreshes JOURNAL-05 relapse grid
AC-3: log-relapse-disclaimer group ai_RNbBHXmq preserves IR icon/text layout; popups marked private in list section remain user-scoped via RLS
items.layout_notes: Two popups (~38 entities combined) tied to relapse-events-section; disclaimer row uses icon+text pair ai_RNbBHXmr/ai_RNbBHXms.
